body_txt: A Guy or Girl of the Week who is practically perfect in every way, except for one little thing that the protagonist finds intolerable. The flaw, whatever it is, is usually something incredibly minor; something any normal person would be able to live with. It's the protagonist, not the dumped character, who comes off looking shallow, self-absorbed, or just plain petty. Other times, it's fairly clear that the characters wouldn't have broken up naturally — at least, not over that — the writers just wanted to hit the Reset Button . A frequent subversion is for the protagonist to finally get over their partner's minor flaw (or finally decide to break up with them), only to get dumped themselves over something just as small and petty. For the sake of comedy, the more that one of these breakups sounds like an example of a tale from Cloud Cuckooland , the better. Usually. Sister Trope to Ridiculously High Relationship Standards . Compare No Sympathy , Derailing Love Interests , Girl of the Week . Contrast Differing Priorities Breakup . See also Toilet Seat Divorce , Proxy Breakup , Second-Act Breakup .
